tool.name: Code Execution
tool.description: Enables the model to generate and execute Python code to solve complex problems, perform calculations, and analyze data.

ai.systemPromptSection:
### Code Execution
This tool enables you to write and execute Python code. Use it for math, data analysis, string processing, and tasks requiring iterative problem solving.

**Capabilities:**
- Iterative execution: Write code, run it, analyze output, and refine.
- Libraries: standard library plus numpy, pandas, matplotlib, scipy, sklearn, and more.
- I/O: Can process uploaded files (CSV, text) and generate Matplotlib plots.

**Usage:**
Implicitly enabled. Generate Python code blocks to use.
